channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Chappell Roan leaves Wasserman talent agency after his mentions in Epstein files
item.description: Chappell Roan says she's left her talent agency after its CEO, Casey Wasserman, was named in files related to late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epst...

item.title: ‘We hold these truths': Viewing the Declaration of Independence, visitors reflect on America at 250
Trump’s immigration chiefs are set to testify in Congress following protester deaths
item.description: The heads of agencies enforcing President Donald Trump’s immigration agenda are set to testify before Congress.

item.title: Russia thinks it can outsmart the US during Ukraine talks, intelligence chief says
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin shows no desire to end Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, according to a senior European intelligence official

item.title: 5 workers from Canadian mining company found dead in Mexico
item.description: Authorities said that five of the 10 missing workers have been identified among 10 bodies found in clandestine graves.

item.title: WATCH: Small plane makes emergency landing on busy intersection in Georgia
item.description: The plane hit three vehicles, but remarkably no one was severely hurt during the incident.

item.title: WATCH: Seahawks meet a mouse at Disneyland
item.description: Fresh off their Super Bowl win, a couple of players from the Seahawks take part in a 40-year-old tradition at Disneyland.

item.title: How Americans’ optimism about their future has changed, according to new polling
WATCH: California surfer swept out to sea survives by clinging to lobster trap buoy
item.description: A rescue team swam out and brought him back to shore after he was spotted by drone a quarter of a mile off shore.

item.title: Trump threatens to block opening of Gordie Howe International Bridge
item.description: President Trump said Monday he would block the opening of the Gordie Howe International Bridge between Detroit and Canada "until the United States is ...

item.title: Son of Norway's future queen accused of raping sleeping woman
item.description: Marius Borg Hoiby, Crown Princess Mette-Marit's 29-year-old son, is on trial facing 38 charges, including raping four women and assaults against ex-gi...

item.title: 'Democrats are on offense': House Dems' campaign arm adds 5 seats to target list
item.description: The DCCC said its targeting seats in Minnesota, Colorado and elsewhere.

item.title: Democrats reject latest White House offer on ICE with DHS funding expiring
item.description: Democratic leaders a say White House proposal doesn't make the grade as they demand new restrictions on ICE and threaten a shutdown of the Homeland Se...
